scripts.dev:full: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:with-db: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "MONGODB,BACKEND,FRONTEND" "mongod --dbpath ./data/db --port 27017 --quiet" "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start-all: concurrently "cd backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start-all:enhanced: concurrently "cd backend && npm run start:enhanced" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start-all:full: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "MONGODB,BACKEND,FRONTEND" "mongod --dbpath ./data/db --port 27017 --quiet" "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.reinstall: cd frontend && npm uninstall @mui/material @mui/styled-engine @emotion/react @emotion/styled @emotion/babel-plugin @mui/x-date-pickers @mui/icons-material && npm i @mui/material@5.11.8 @mui/styled-engine@5.11.8 @emotion/react@11.10.6 @emotion/styled@11.10.6 @emotion/babel-plugin@11.10.6 @mui/icons-material@5.11.8 @mui/x-date-pickers@5.0.20 --legacy-peer-deps && cd .. && npm run dev
